name: Fisher of Galilee
oracleText:
When Fisher of Galilee enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token.
Whenever a Fish you control attacks, scry 1.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Peter Paul Rubens's "The Miraculous Draught of Fishes" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of the public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Peter Paul Rubens, The Miraculous Draught of Fishes
classics.sourceNotes: The net-full-of-fish composition maps cleanly onto Galilee calling imagery.
